zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertha van Arkel於大約1265年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德時，她的父親Otto I van Arkel30歲，母親Mechteld van Heusden22歲。她於1280年與Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1322年2月25日享年58歲，埋葬在荷蘭武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertha van Arkel于大约1265年出生在荷兰-拉藍德时，她的父亲Otto I van Arkel30岁，母亲Mechteld van Heusden22岁。她于1280年与Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1322年2月25日享年58岁，埋葬在荷兰武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Arkel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton: from the Old Breton personal name Arthmael, composed of the elements arth ‘bear’ (in a transferred sense ‘soldier’) + mael ‘prince’, Latinized as Armagilus. This was the name of a Christian saint (5th century) who was the subject of a local cult in Brittany.
Jewish (from Ukraine): artificial name from Yiddish dialect (h)arml ‘hermine’.

variants.name: Ermel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Jurgen, Markus, Matthias.

German: from Middle High German ermel ‘sleeve’, a metonymic occupational name for a sleeve maker. Alternatively, it may have been a nickname for someone who wore clothing with conspicuous sleeves; in medieval times the size of sleeves was regulated by luxury laws.
German: from a pet form of any of the ancient Germanic personal names formed with Erm, from erm, irm ‘all-encompassing, great’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace). Compare Armel 1.

nameMeanings.name: Bertha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of a Continental Germanic name, a short form of various compound women's personal names derived from berht ‘famous’ (akin to Modern English bright). It probably existed in England before the Conquest, and was certainly reinforced by Norman use, but fell out of use in the 15th century. It was reintroduced into the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century, but has once again gone out of fashion.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertha van Arkel was born about 1265, in South Holland, Netherlands, her father, Otto I van Arkel, was 30 and her mother, Mechteld van Heusden, was 22. She married Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein in 1280. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 25 February 1322, at the age of 58, and was buried in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertha van Arkel est née environ 1265, à Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Otto I van Arkel, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mechteld van Heusden, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein en 1280. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 25 février 1322, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à IJsselstein, Utrecht, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bertha van Arkel um 1265 in Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto I van Arkel 30 und ihre Mutter Mechteld van Heusden 22. Sie hat 1280 Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 25. Februar 1322 im Alter von 58 Jahren und wurde in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha van Arkel è nata il circa 1265 nel Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Otto I van Arkel, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Mechteld van Heusden, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein nel 1280. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 febbraio 1322, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a IJsselstein, Utrecht, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertha van Arkelが約1265年にオランダズイド-hオランドで生まれた時，父Otto I van Arkelは30歳，母Mechteld van Heusdenは22歳であった。1280年にGijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselsteinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1322年2月25日に58歳で死去し，オランダウトレチトイジセルステインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertha van Arkel(이)가 대략 1265년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto I van Arkel(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mechteld van Heusden(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1280년 Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1322년 2월 25일 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 우트레트 이제이셀스타인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha van Arkel nasceu aproximadamente 1265, em Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Otto I van Arkel, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mechteld van Heusden, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein em 1280. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1322, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertha van Arkel родилась около 1265 г. в местности зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Otto I van Arkel было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mechteld van Heusden, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein в 1280 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 25 февраля 1322 г. в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности иджсселстин, утречт, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bertha van Arkel nació aproximadamente 1265, en Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Otto I van Arkel, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mechteld van Heusden, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Gijsbrecht van Amstel IJsselstein en 1280. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de febrero de 1322, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Bajos.
